{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230308301C33653F7E4F60B715F9"}"},"total":9732},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7064260636343796515","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"老实说来这本书非常符合我的口味。一般看到的言情小说会觉得太虐心太狗血。会让读者产生一种心痛的感觉。甚至有的时候在最终的结局，读者会因作品中角色没有能够获得完美的结局，而感染伤心的情感。剧情高甜，但甜而不腻。也很契合高三的学校的氛围。让我本人感觉很真实。最后就是，作者自身的文化水平应该不错，实名无限好评。","text_exts":[{"e":25,"s":21,"text":"言情小说","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%A8%80%E6%83%85%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177420651060B715F9%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227064260636343796515%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227030372408133422121%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%A8%80%E6%83%85%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1644776390,"group_id":"7030372408133422121","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一生追求，一世挚爱。我愿以凡人之躯着白衣，效仿伟岸的神明。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1GmiGETPJpQuxe02k6wseY=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/02f518e4d01848ebab3c031d85e7e8f2~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791487&x-signature=HOVyBxD8ECEzolkWTBk4CmPetCA%3D","user_id":"51045180525","user_name":"凌寒润雪"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"51045180525","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7030372408133422121","book_info":{"abstract":"【狗粮甜宠+重生+系统+青春校园+控分学霸+单女主+都市日常】
　　胡斐一夜之间，回到了十年前。
　　再次见到了日思夜想的她。
　　“同学，你是掉了什么东西吗？”
　　“对，我掉了我最珍贵的东西。”
　　“啊，是什么，要不要我帮你找找。”
　　“不用了，我想……我已经找到了。”
　　少年深深地看着对方：我要找的，就是你啊！！！
　　前世的遗憾，今生统统弥补。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/df428c9cb5e9ff25bc7d99c649e41a55","author":"乱秀","author_id":"","book_id":"7030372408133422121","book_name":"重生：学霸和软萌校花的完美人生","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":82,"name":"学霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=82&name=学霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":385,"name":"校花","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=385&name=校花&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7030570987837981197","read_count":"24240","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1582102"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"689","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,重生,学霸,校花,单女主,1v1,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/1bf53dbf7108fb7122a5065675e69744~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779390510&x-signature=ZO%2BWa5sbDIcKM0Z7nTie4eSmylQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_in
